events.label: reasoning
events.text:
The scenario describes head joints unfilled with visible voids in block/brick laying on a commercial project. This is a masonry compliance issue under TMS 402/602.

TMS 402/602 requires that head joints (vertical mortar joints) be fully filled. Unfilled head joints with visible voids are non-compliant. This affects structural integrity, moisture resistance, and fire resistance.

Decision: fail
Risk: high (structural concern)
Work stage: rough-complete
Component conditions: installed-defective, non-compliant
Percent complete: maybe 85% since roughed in but needs rework
Value: 0 (no numeric reading requested)
Confidence: high, say 0.9
Findings: head joints unfilled with visible voids
Actions: repoint/redo head joints, ensure full mortar fill
References: TMS 402/602
